channel.title: Projects on DISCO Open Source
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on DISCO Open Source

item.title: Sarsys
item.description: System for command, control and communications managements for Search and Rescue Repositories https://github.com/DISCOOS/sarsys-app https://github.com/DISCOOS/sarsys-web https://github.com/DISCOOS/sarsys-data https://github.com/DISCOOS/sarsys-backend
